reforms.description: A special tax deduction for business investment was approved by Parliament, amounting to 20 percent for purchases of machinery and certain equipment, aimed at stimulating productive investment.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Encourages firms to invest in machinery and equipment, which can enhance productivity and innovation capacity.
reforms.status_evidence: The special tax deduction for business investment was approved by Parliament.
reforms.importance_rationale: The tax deduction represents a significant incentive for businesses to invest, which can lead to improved economic performance and innovation.
reforms.source_quote: A special tax deduction for business investment was approved by Parliament, amounting to 20 percent for purchases of machinery and certain equipment.
